@graph.description: Acetyl-11-keto-beta-boswellic acid is a boswellic acid emphasized in Boswellia standardization discussions. Its relevance is mechanistically strong for inflammatory pathways, but isolated-compound human evidence is much thinner than extract-level evidence.
